description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the gcc Docker image and defines a single build stage. Add a build job that runs in the build stage, with a before_script that updates apt and installs make and cmake, then prints the versions of cmake, make, gcc, and ld. Cache all *.o files, then execute the script 'cmake . && make execasm' to compile the execasm binary, and publish the resulting execasm file as a build artifact. No additional services, variables, or rules are required.
